user_story: As a Travel admin, I want to view the travel management email templates list, so that I can manage travel and expense related emails
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As a Travel admin, I want to open and view a specific travel email template such as Travel Management Actual Expense Email, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the travel email templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As a Travel admin, I want to refresh the travel email templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As a Travel admin, I want to switch to the Notification Templates view for travel, so that I can manage notifications alongside emails
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Email Templates screen; When I select the Notification Templates tab; Then the notification templates are shown
